title: Improve API key access controls
description: Added deny-by-default API key ACLs, account-aware credential selection, combo permissions, and a responsive access editor.
public_description: Added a visual way to control API key access to providers, accounts, models, and combos.
internal_description: Added deny-by-default API key ACLs, account-aware credential selection, combo permissions, and a responsive access editor.

git.deployment_commit_note: Final commit SHA is only known after commit creation; correlate by reading this changelog entry from the deployed GitHub Actions headSha.
